name: R Data Science
postCreateCommand: printf '#!/bin/sh\nexit 0' | sudo tee /usr/local/bin/xdg-open > /dev/null && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/xdg-open && curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -LsSf https://github.com/eitsupi/arf/releases/latest/download/arf-console-installer.sh | sh && quarto install tinytex --no-prompt && R -e 'install.packages(c("tutorial.helpers", "quarto"))' && R -e 'pak::pak("PPBDS/positron.tutorials")'
